title: Operating Model Deck
summary: Executive-level summary of the target model, lifecycle, pillars, roles, and adoption path.

title: Governance Control Matrix
summary: Maps agent types, actions, approval thresholds, policies, evidence requirements, and escalation paths.

title: Domain & Capability Map
summary: Visual representation of business capabilities, bounded contexts, key events, screens, inputs, outputs, and interfaces.

title: Agent Role Catalog
summary: Defines each agent’s purpose, inputs, outputs, limits, tools, and review expectations.

title: Evidence Pack
summary: Collection of test results, approvals, policy evaluations, and release evidence used to support governed delivery.

title: Operational Runbook
summary: Procedures for monitoring, incident handling, rollback, drift detection, and escalation in production.
